description: Teach the guardrails-review skill to probe the four folders as BLOCKERs where a required folder/check is missing (re-homed GR2018: empty/tautological terminal folder), and to emit the live-probe guidance as an ADVISORY WARN (not a BLOCK): plan-level process-start FINE, network/poll WARN; task-level prefer byte/exit, network/poll WARN
